collection-method.description: Collection method, interview, sensor, liaison, exploitation or observation method used.

collection-time.description: Date-time group (DTG) or timestamp when information was collected.

collector-unit.description: Unit, organization or collector element that collected or reported the information.

confidence.description: Analytic confidence or certainty assigned to the assessed information.

evaluation.description: Evaluation of source, information, BDA, bias, access, timeliness or corroboration.

information-credibility.description: Information credibility rating, including Admiralty/NATO-style 1-6 ratings where applicable.

raw-assessment.description: Original source evaluation, collector note, grading record or supporting file.

related-report.description: Related INTREP, intelligence report, message or MISP event/object identifier.

related-requirement.description: Related PIR, IR, RFI, tasking or collection requirement identifier.

source-id.description: Identifier, code name or local reference for the source, collector or reporting channel.

source-reliability.description: Source reliability rating, including Admiralty/NATO-style A-F ratings where applicable.

source-summary.description: Non-sensitive summary of the source, access, placement or reporting channel.

source-type.description: Type of source or collection discipline.

description: Object template to capture source reliability, information credibility and evaluation details supporting an INTREP or similar intelligence report.
name: intelligence-source-assessment
